! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Github
! Description: Domain set for Github traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 8
! Breakdown: service_rules=8

! GitHub
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||github.com^                             ! GitHub - main platform
||github.io^                              ! GitHub Pages
||githubusercontent.com^                  ! GitHub - raw content / assets
||githubassets.com^                        ! GitHub - static assets
||github.dev^                             ! GitHub - web editor
||copilot.github.com^                     ! GitHub Copilot
||api.github.com^                         ! GitHub - API
||ghcr.io^                                ! GitHub Container Registry
